profile.name: Amit Shaw
profile.headline: Accounting Assistant | Digital Marketing Support | Website Builder | AI Productivity Workflows
profile.subheadline: I support businesses with accurate accounting operations, organized billing workflows, digital marketing execution, and professional websites that improve visibility and daily efficiency.
profile.aboutHtml:
I'm Amit Shaw, an Accounting Assistant and Digital Marketing Support professional focused on helping businesses stay accurate, organized, and more visible online.

My work includes vendor ledger management, purchase entries, billing operations, Meta Ads support, website structuring, and AI-assisted workflow execution.

I bring together financial accuracy and digital support so daily operations run smoothly while business visibility and presentation continue to improve.

services.title: Accounting Operations Support

services.description: Consistent purchase entry updates and record keeping designed to support smoother internal workflows and proper documentation.

services.description: Support for billing systems, cash handling, UPI transactions, and customer-facing billing processes with accuracy and speed.

services.description: MS Excel, ChatGPT, Codex, Claude, and AI productivity workflows used to speed up research, planning, and execution.

experiences.company: Hospaccx, A Unit of Banerjee Diagnostic Foundation
experiences.description: Maintaining vendor ledgers and purchase entries in Tally Prime, recording daily financial transactions, supporting document coordination, and helping improve accounting workflow accuracy.

experiences.company: Hospaccx, A Unit of Banerjee Diagnostic Foundation
experiences.description: Managed daily billing operations, handled cash and UPI transactions, maintained sales records, and worked with billing and inventory systems for accurate transaction processing.

projects.title: Hospital Website Development
projects.description: Problem: The hospital had limited online presence and needed a more professional digital identity to build trust and improve patient communication. Solution: I developed a modern, responsive website designed to present the hospital clearly across desktop and mobile devices, with service pages and an easy contact system. Result: The new website improved branding, strengthened credibility, and created a better experience for visitors looking for services and contact details.

projects.title: Doctor Portfolio Website
projects.description: Built a professional doctor portfolio website using AI-assisted development tools with a clean layout, user-friendly navigation, and accessibility-focused structure.

projects.title: Meta Ads And Lead Generation Support
projects.description: Campaign support focused on better reach, lead generation, and visibility through structured Meta Ads execution and social media planning.

projects.title: AI-Assisted Website And App Workflow
projects.description: Prompt-based building, content planning, and tool-assisted execution used to structure websites, workflows, and professional digital assets faster.
